intent_clarifier_ready.signal: intent clarifier contract status is ready
intent_clarifier_ready.why_it_matters: Weak upstream intent tends to cascade into generic layout and branding choices.
intent_clarifier_ready.recommended_fix: Clarify audience, domain, goal, style direction and originality level before stronger handoff claims.

visual_intent_contract_ready.signal: visual intent contract status is ready
visual_intent_contract_ready.why_it_matters: UI work should not reach final readiness without an explicit visual direction contract.
visual_intent_contract_ready.recommended_fix: Complete the visual intent contract before stronger visual readiness claims.

brand_json_v2_ready.signal: brand json v2 readiness status is ready
brand_json_v2_ready.why_it_matters: Identity and differentiation should be explicit before final UI handoff.
brand_json_v2_ready.recommended_fix: Document an explicit brand profile strong enough to act as a governed brand artifact.

ui_pre_return_ready.why_it_matters: Atlas should not skip the final local pre-return UI check.
ui_pre_return_ready.recommended_fix: Resolve the pre-return blockers before claiming the UI is ready.

design_quality_ready.signal: design quality review is ready for handoff
design_quality_ready.why_it_matters: Functionally correct but visually weak work should not pass a final UI gate.
design_quality_ready.recommended_fix: Address visual-system and hierarchy problems before handoff.

responsive_baseline_present.signal: responsive baseline check is present and passing
responsive_baseline_present.why_it_matters: Frontend handoff claims need at least one explicit responsive signal.
responsive_baseline_present.recommended_fix: Capture a passing responsive baseline check before final handoff.

evidence_expectations_defined.why_it_matters: Without explicit proof expectations, Atlas risks giving unsupported PASS claims.
evidence_expectations_defined.recommended_fix: Declare the minimum evidence expected before PASS.
